mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCalls, COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS totalInputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS totalOutputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens FROM ai_token_usage WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens, COUNT(*) AS callCount FROM ai_token_usage WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date

SELECT model_name AS modelName, COUNT(*) AS callCount, COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens FROM ai_token_usage WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY model_name ORDER BY totalTokens DESC

SELECT scene, COUNT(*) AS callCount, COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens FROM ai_token_usage WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY scene ORDER BY totalTokens DESC

SELECT t.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.login_name) AS userName, COUNT(*) AS callCount, COALESCE(SUM(t.total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens FROM ai_token_usage t LEFT JOIN `user` u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY t.user_id, u.nickname, u.login_name ORDER BY totalTokens DESC LIMIT #{limit}
